name: accessiBe
description: accessiBe — AI-powered web accessibility compliance tool for WCAG 2.1 and ADA, scanning and remediating issues via JS widget.

seo.title: accessiBe — Compliance Automation
seo.meta_description: accessiBe: accessiBe — AI-powered web accessibility compliance tool for WCAG 2.1 and ADA, scanning and remediating issues via JS widget.

when_to_use: ADA compliance remediation for public-facing web apps
WCAG 2.1 AA audit automation before product launches
Accessibility overlay deployment via JS CDN snippet
GDPR-aligned screen reader support for EU markets

pros: One-line JS snippet deploys accessibility widget fast
Automated daily scans catch new WCAG regressions
Bundled litigation support package for ADA lawsuits
cons: Overlays widely criticized by disability advocates as non-compliant
Cannot fix underlying HTML issues in source code
Target of multiple lawsuits despite marketing claims
Screen reader users often report broken navigation
review.verdict: Cheap compliance theater that may create more legal risk than it prevents — fix your actual markup instead.
review.best_for: Small sites needing a cosmetic compliance statement without engineering budget
review.not_for: Teams seriously committed to WCAG compliance or serving screen reader users

lock_in.reason: JS widget easily removed but remediation data stays proprietary
